votes.rationale: motion-0048 reconciles agent-panels.yaml with the ratified Phase 1 staffing canon. Each panel now lists 2 candidates matching the live Phase 1 slots. Scaffold output confirmed at 2 candidate files for both Librarian and Builder. Operator rubric YAML structure fixed. Selectors marked deferred. loadSlots overlay from motion-0047 intact.

The edit is structurally correct and tightly scoped. The exact-5 guard was relaxed to 2+ which is forward-compatible. No secondary fixed-shape assumptions were found in panel-select.mjs or panelSelectCore.mjs. Historical 5-candidate scaffold artifacts in older motions are intentionally left alone.

Panel structure now matches Phase 1 staffing canon. The mismatch between model-slots-phase1.yaml and agent-panels.yaml is resolved. Both scaffold and selection paths operate correctly on the new 2-candidate shape. No runtime behavior introduced, no selectors activated.
